rationale: All three blocking findings from code-review.final are resolved. CR-001: negative exclusion replaced with positive includes('sonnet') guard plus debug log; new test covers custom model ID. CR-002: BaseAgentAdapter.transformEnvVars and bedrock.template.ts both now set CLAUDE_CODE_SUBAGENT_MODEL to CODEMIE_OPUS_MODEL when no sonnet model is provisioned. CR-003: broken process.env object replacement replaced with vi.stubEnv / vi.unstubAllEnvs(). All 35 unit tests pass; typecheck clean.

standards_review.notes: Fix-up commit uses fix(setup) with compliant subject. Scoped to setup; references EPMCDME-12779.
No new any, explicit types maintained, optional-chaining used for envMapping.sonnetModel?.includes().
No new security surface. Fallback only routes a provisioned model ID string — no credential or injection risk.

finding_status.notes: setup.ts:631 now uses includes('sonnet') positive check. Custom model ID regression test added.
BaseAgentAdapter.ts:1039 else-if sets CLAUDE_CODE_SUBAGENT_MODEL=CODEMIE_OPUS_MODEL when sonnet absent. bedrock.template.ts:116 else-if does the same. Both paths verified.
Test file now uses vi.stubEnv in beforeEach and vi.unstubAllEnvs() in afterEach. process.env object replacement removed.
